prompts.text: What was the highlight of your day?
What is something you learned today that surprised you?
If you could relive one moment from today, which would it be?
What challenge did you face today, and how did you handle it?
How did today compare to what you expected when you woke up?
What conversation from today stuck with you the most?
What would you do differently if you could redo today?
What moment today made you pause and think?
How did you take care of yourself today?
What is one thing from today that you want to remember a year from now?
What are three small things you appreciated today?
Who made a positive difference in your day, and how?
What is something in your daily routine that you often take for granted?
What skill or ability are you grateful to have?
What is a comfort in your life that you are thankful for?
What recent experience are you grateful to have had?
What is something beautiful you noticed today?
Who is someone in your life you haven't thanked enough?
What challenge in your past are you now grateful for?
What part of your home or surroundings brings you comfort?
What emotions came up for you most today?
What is a pattern in your behavior that you have been noticing lately?
When did you feel most like yourself today?
What is something you have been avoiding, and why?
How do you feel right now, physically and emotionally?
What belief about yourself would you like to challenge?
When did you feel most energized today, and when most drained?
What is a boundary you need to set or reinforce?
What does your inner critic say most often, and is it true?
How do you typically react when things do not go as planned?
If your day were a movie scene, what genre would it be?
Write a six-word story that captures how you feel right now.
If you could have any superpower just for tomorrow, what would it be and why?
Describe your ideal day from start to finish with no constraints.
If you could send a message to yourself five years ago, what would it say?
What would your life look like if you followed your wildest dream?
If your current mood were a weather forecast, what would it be?
Write about a place, real or imaginary, where you feel completely at peace.
If you could have dinner with anyone, living or historical, who would it be and what would you ask?
What song best describes your week so far, and why?
What is one small step you can take tomorrow toward a goal you care about?
What does success look like for you this month?
What habit would you like to build, and what is the smallest version of it?
What is holding you back from something you want to pursue?
Where do you want to be in six months, and what needs to happen to get there?
What is one thing you keep postponing that would make a real difference?
What did you make progress on recently, even if it felt small?
If you had one extra hour each day, how would you spend it?
What is a skill you want to develop, and how could you practice it this week?
What would you attempt if you knew you could not fail?
